bullets.text: Q2 CR 93.2 (3.6 pts better than Q2 2016); Personal Lines CR 93.2 (vs. 96.7 in Q2 2016); Commercial Lines CR 91.6 (3.1 pts better YOY) with ~9 pts of commercial rate still earning in; YTD CR healthy with 13% NPW growth.
NPW grew 14% YOY in Q2 and 13% YTD; Personal Lines NPW +14% Q2 (+13% YTD); Commercial Lines NPW +18% YOY; Snapshot-enrolled policies crossed $4B in trailing 12-month written premium.

Milestone quarter: 11 million auto PIFs, 1 million boat PIFs; Robinson (auto+home bundle) PIFs grew ~23% YOY with new business applications up 50%+ YOY; all-time high total auto PLE set in Q2 after slight Q1 dip reversed.

HomeQuote Explorer rolled out nationally after successful Q1 pilot (excluding FL, AK, HI); Snapshot mobile app expanded to 26 Direct states and 5 Agency states; photo estimating deployed via mobile app approaching full countrywide rollout; 50th state commercial auto system completed.

Photo estimating via mobile app: customers submit photos/video under 15 minutes; claims resolved faster with accurate estimates; Snapshot mobile app: 38% of Direct new customers enrolling where available (vs. 34% without app); commercial policy admin system launched in first state.

Q2 investment return 1.3% FTE (equity +3.5%, fixed income +1.1%); YTD 3.1%; Fed second 2017 rate hike flattened yield curve; investing cash from operations at reasonable yields; strong capital position maintained.

'Paths to Partnership' agent program launched nationwide in April: national commission schedule rewarding volume and retention plus annual performance bonuses and marketing support; agent and trade association feedback described as excellent with increased engagement.

Commercial Lines new business applications down only 4% vs. -20% in Q1, showing rapid recovery as underwriting restrictions lifted; rate increases from late 2016/early 2017 earning into portfolio; Hawaii entry completed the 50-state commercial auto map.

Property new business applications up 35% YOY Q2 and 33% YTD; Property PIFs up 11% YOY; Platinum agent ranks doubled YOY driving Agency Robinson growth; Progressive Advantage Agency expanded with licensed consultants available online.

Increased media spend twice in 2017 based on strong profitability; advertising focused on homeowners insurance, auto/home bundling, and HQX generating strong results; investor webcast format shifted to 90-minute deep-dive webcasts with specific topic presentations.
